items.text:
that we know how to open it.
We need to set up 20 gems --

Twenty! That's ... going to take some doing.
Why is it so hard to open?

Flecklorica were used to store and protect
the most valuable of valuables.
Thicker shell, more valuable.

20 gems is good for us;
what's inside must be truly unique.

So start laying out the sockets,
I'll have some guys hoist
that special Beam into position.
Amazed they let you drag that down here.

They're bad at inventory,
and it'll be back before they miss it.

The Koltisses can really lose track
of an incredible rare Beamcaster, that easily?

They've done worse. Pure negligence.
Not unique to them, though.
Most of the families these days, really.

Cept ours and a couple allies
keeping quiet til we verify
what's in the lorca.
